name: Atwater
blurbEn: Atwater station sits at the edge of Westmount, adjacent to the Atwater Market and Lachine Canal — one of Montreal's most desirable urban amenities. The surrounding Shaughnessy Village area has undergone rapid condo development. The Lachine Canal corridor attracts cyclists, professionals, and young families who want direct access to nature without leaving the city.
blurbFr: La station Atwater se situe à la limite de Westmount, adjacente au Marché Atwater et au Canal Lachine — l'une des infrastructures urbaines les plus prisées de Montréal. Le quartier Shaughnessy Village voisin a connu un développement condo rapide.
avgPriceFr: 500 K–900 K $ (condos), prime pour les vues sur le canal
